name: The Last King
intro_text: In the aftermath of the Ward Theatre disaster, you have pieced together a name: Nigel Engram, patron of the arts and rumoured devotee of something far older than theatre.

Tonight he is hosting a private masquerade at his estate. The guest list includes names you recognise from the cult's ledger. You have obtained an invitation — forged or otherwise — and you intend to find answers.
Beneath the masks and the music, something is watching.
setup_instructions: Place 1 Cultist enemy at each unrevealed location.
The 5 Guest enemies are shuffled and placed face-down; 1 per investigator enters play during setup.
Nigel Engram (03071) is set aside and enters play when his location is revealed.

R1.label: Resolution 1 — The conspiracy is exposed
text: You have gathered enough evidence to understand the shape of the cult and its purpose. The masquerade is over — at least for tonight.
But Nigel Engram escaped, and the Yellow Sign has been seen in places it should not be. The path leads on.
Record in the campaign log: *The investigators uncovered the conspiracy. Each investigator earns 1 bonus XP per Cultist identified.*

R2.label: Resolution 2 — You fled the estate
text: The guests began to change. Behind their masks were faces that were not faces. You ran.
You survived, but whatever Nigel Engram was planning is now complete. The Yellow Sign glows in your memory.
Record in the campaign log: *The investigators fled the estate.*

defeat.label: Defeat — Consumed by the masquerade
text: The masks come off at midnight. What is underneath is not human. You do not escape.
Record in the campaign log: *The investigators were defeated at The Last King. Each investigator gains 1 physical and 1 mental trauma.*
